rect.style: paint-order: fill; fill: color(srgb-linear 0.048 0.283 1); pointer-events: none;

text.style: fill: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 40px; font-weight: 700; text-anchor: middle; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(241, 241, 241); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 66px; font-weight: 700; white-space: pre;
fill: rgb(241, 241, 241); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; white-space: pre;
